journal.name: Yale Journal of Health Policy, Law, and Ethics

registry_refs.notes: The registry contains one Yale Connect route for this publication.

publication_scope.notes: Other Yale Connect organizations are out of scope.

evidence.notes: Allows the visible archive path but disallows /*ajax_widget_new and /downloads/.
Redirects to the generic archive shell at /archive/?club_url=yjhple.
Static HTML contains only the Yale Connect loading shell and no issue, article, or PDF links. Three bounded probes found no embedded archive data or permitted API route.

reconnaissance.notes: Stopped after three short archive probes. The content-bearing client route appears to belong to a robots-disallowed AJAX family, so no browser or endpoint bypass was attempted.

scope.notes: Publication contents could not be enumerated during the bounded static probe.

entry_points.notes: Canonical shell after redirect; not yet a usable scraper seed.

archive_patterns.notes: The pattern identifies the group but does not expose records in static HTML.

pagination.termination: Unknown because archive records were not present in static HTML.
pagination.notes: Do not probe the robots-disallowed AJAX widget route.

layout_eras.label: Current Yale Connect client shell
layout_eras.notes: No publication records were statically visible, so historical eras remain unsampled.

validation.notes: No permitted PDF route was discovered and no file was requested.

robots.notes: The archive shell is allowed, but the apparent AJAX widget and /downloads/ families are disallowed.

barriers.notes: The allowed static response contains only a loading shell.
The likely content-bearing AJAX widget route is disallowed, so it was not probed.

access.politeness_notes: Recheck robots before any browser session and do not request disallowed AJAX or download routes.

verdict.summary: The publication-scoped URL resolves, but only to a JavaScript loading shell; static reconnaissance cannot enumerate issues or files without touching a robots-disallowed route.
verdict.next_action: Manually inspect an authorized browser session to determine whether a robots-permitted archive endpoint exists; otherwise treat the site as metadata-unavailable.
verdict.recommended_adapter: YaleConnectArchiveAdapter (new; only if a robots-permitted endpoint is confirmed)
verdict.implementation_notes: Do not map the host to a broad generic adapter because many Yale organizations share it.
